description: Feature queue M.E.R.L.I.N. — S1 COMPLETE (15 archived). S2+S3 active. 10+ pending minimum.

sprints.S1: COMPLETE — Core loop jouable, bugs critiques fixes, LLM valide
sprints.S2: CONTENU & SYSTEMES — biomes, verbes, MOS, cleanup restant
sprints.S3: POLISH & ROBUSTESSE — edge cases, LLM robustesse, UX, pixel render
sprints.S4: INTEGRATION & EXPORT — web build, CI/CD, demo jouable

rules.auto_generate_when_below: If fewer than 10 pending tasks remain, read docs/DEV_PLAN_V2.5.md and docs/GAME_DESIGN_BIBLE.md to generate new tasks until 10+ pending.
rules.task_decomposition: Each task must be completable in 1 cycle (~15 min). Break large features into atomic tasks.
rules.priority_algorithm: P0=critical bugs, P1-P5=sprint current, P6-P10=sprint next, P11+=backlog

tasks.title: Corriger intervals biomes + conditions arcs (bible v2.4 s.3.6 + s.4.3)
tasks.description: S2-INTEGRATION audit: 7/8 biome intervals wrong vs bible s.4.3 + arc names/conditions/counts wrong for 7 biomes vs bible s.3.6.

tasks.title: Fix run.day counter: increment per card in resolve_choice()
tasks.description: PAT-012 (S2-INTEGRATION): run.day is initialized to 1 but never incremented. LLM context always shows 'Jour 1' regardless of run length. Fix: add CARDS_PER_DAY constant (merlin_constants.gd) + increment run['day'] in resolve_choice() when cards_played % CARDS_PER_DAY == 0. Confirmed FAIL in S2-CONTEXT-REGRESSION-TEST (line 19 store_run.gd).

tasks.title: Regression test: BUG-SIGNAL-DELTA-FIX + S2-DAY-TICK-FIX applied correctly
tasks.description: After BUG-SIGNAL-DELTA-FIX and S2-DAY-TICK-FIX are applied, verify: (1) reputation_changed emits actual_delta = new_val - old_rep (not raw rep_delta). Test: faction_rep=95, delta=+20 → emit delta=+5 not +20. (2) CARDS_PER_DAY constant exists in merlin_constants.gd. (3) resolve_choice() increments run['day'] every CARDS_PER_DAY cards. (4) LLM context day field changes over a simulated 30-card run. (5) All S2-CONTEXT-REGRESSION-TEST regressions still PASS.

tasks.title: Cycle jour/nuit PS1 + DA cohérente toutes scènes (remplace S3-AMBIENT + S3-PIXEL)
tasks.description: Director q-20260413-003 + q-20260412-002 + q-20260412-004: Unified visual task replacing S3-AMBIENT-LIGHTING and S3-PIXEL-RENDER. Cycle jour/nuit en mode PS1 avec volumétrie. Temps réel machine/serveur pour saisons et cycle quotidien. DA cohérente entre TOUTES les scènes et animations. Effets visuels: pixel snap, affine textures, low-poly volumetric fog, dithering shadows, viewport scale. Exposer time_of_day + season dans run state + LLM context. Tout doit être driver sous la même logique graphique. Director note: 'toute la DA doit être cohérente entre toutes les scènes, animations. Tout doit être driver sous la même logique graphique sur l'ensemble des rendus graphiques.'

tasks.title: Typographie hybride: titre celtique + corps sans-serif
tasks.description: Director q-003: FONT_TITLE (celtique) + FONT_BODY (sans-serif) dans MerlinVisual.

tasks.title: Memoire narrative: RAG pour resume compresse story_log
tasks.description: Director q-001: RAG-based narrative memory. add_narrative_entry() per card, get_narrative_summary() for 3-5 items.

tasks.title: Configurer export web HTML5 automatise
tasks.description: Setup Godot HTML5 export. Verify SharedArrayBuffer headers. Output to web-export/.

tasks.title: Refonte Menu Principal
tasks.description: Meilleure introduction, shaders et graphismes PS1 avec bonne volumétrie et cycle jour/nuit, la scène doit être plus viable. Deep dive et itère jusqu'à acceptation du retour correct

tasks.title: Verifier formule Anam cross-run: mort = anam × min(cartes/30, 1.0)
tasks.description: Bible s.5.1: Anam est la monnaie cross-run (~10 runs/noeud). A la mort: gain_anam = run.anam_accumulated * min(run.cards_played / 30.0, 1.0). Verifier: (1) run.anam_accumulated est incremente correctement (non zero). (2) La formule de mort utilise min(cartes/30, 1.0) et non un cap fixe. (3) merlin_save_system.gd persiste meta.total_anam correctement. (4) reset run.anam_accumulated a 0 apres mort. Si formule manquante ou incorrecte: implementer selon bible.

tasks.title: Cleanup mg_meditation: resolve orphaned preload after q-20260413-004 decision
tasks.description: BLOCKED until director answers q-20260413-004 (mg_meditation disposition). After answer: (A) If 'delete' → remove mg_meditation.gd + remove match case line 138 from create_minigame(). (B) If 'move to another field' → add mg_meditation to GAMES[field] + keep match case. (C) If 'add to esprit (4 entries)' → add to GAMES['esprit'] + FIELD_MINIGAMES['esprit']. (D) If 'keep for future' → remove match case line 138 only (dead code cleanup). Also fix cosmetic: reorganize match block comments so mg_sang_froid is under # Esprit.

tasks.title: Audit SFXManager: 30+ sons proceduaux enregistres, zero refs manquantes
tasks.description: Bible overview: SFXManager gere 30+ sons proceduaux. Verifier: (1) SFXManager.gd existe et est un autoload valide. (2) >= 30 entrees de sons enregistrees. (3) Aucune ref a un fichier .wav/.ogg/.mp3 manquant. (4) play_sfx() / stop_sfx() existent. (5) Pas de deprecations AudioStreamPlayer Godot 3 vs 4. Rapport: count sons, refs manquantes, pattern procedural.
